Props.Text: Welcome to Strawbee!
Strawbees do be Rawring
Q: How many ppls can be in my tribe?
Four :).
We dont wanna limit people too much but also dont want huge groups bulking up. Its anyways just PvE!.
Q: What are the rates (XP, harvest, taming, breeding)?
A: This is 10x! For more Info click below!

🌿 STRAWBEE PvE RATES

⭐ XP
• Harvest XP: 3x
• Kill XP: 3x
• Generic XP: 2.5x
• Special XP: 2.5x
• Boss XP: 8x

🪓 Harvesting
• Harvest Amount: 10x
• Player Harvest Damage: 2.5x
• Dino Harvest Damage: 5x

🦖 Taming
• Taming Speed: 10x

🥚 Breeding
• Hatch Speed: 10x
• Mature Speed: 5x
• Imprint: 5x

📦 QoL
• Stack Size: 25x
• Unlimited Mindwipes
• No Cryo Sickness
• Crossplay Enabled
THIS PAGE IS STILL IN CONSTRUCTION!!!
The page is still under construction and might contain spelling mistakes or missing content
Q: Yes, but they're simple.
A: See Rules and Guides Tab or find them on our Discord in the rules channel!
Q: Please report rule violations through the Discord server.

A: You can use out ticket system on DIscord. When making a report, include: The player's in-game name (and tribe name if possible), A brief description of what happened, Screenshots or video evidence whenever possible and the location where the incident occoured. False reports or reports made in bad faith may result in action being taken against the reporter. All reports will be reviewed by the admin team before any action is taken.
Q: Can I bring my friends to the server?

A: Absolutely! Friends are welcome to join and play together. Please remember that the maximum tribe size is 4 players. The tribe limit exists to help keep the server balanced and encourage more players and tribes to join, rather than having a few large tribes take up most of the server population.We want everyone to have the opportunity to build, progress, and be part of the community, especially while the server is limited to 20 slots.
Q: Is there a Discord server for the community?

A: Yes, we have a Discord server where players can chat, share tips, and participate in events. Joining the Discord is highly recommended to stay connected with the community and keep up to date with everything happening on the server. Discord Invite: https://discord.gg/FbFzcnqwTw
Q: Can I suggest changes or improvements for the server?

A:  Absolutely! Player feedback is always welcome. If you have ideas for server settings, quality-of-life improvements, events, mods, future maps, or other changes, feel free to share them in the Discord server. While not every suggestion can be implemented, all feedback will be considered. Our goal is to build a fun and enjoyable community-driven server, and player input helps us improve the experience for everyone.
Q: You can contact the server admins through the Discord server. For general questions, use the #questions channel. For incidents, ise the Ticket System!
A: If you need assistance or have any concerns, you can reach out to our server admins via Discord. They are here to help resolve any issues and ensure everyone has an enjoyable gaming experience.

Got a question buzzing around in your head? Ask in chat or join our Discord hive! The Strawbees are always around to lend a wing. Good luck, survivor, and may your tames be strong and your honey always sweet.
This Page is still in work!!!
⚠️ This page is a work in progress. Some sections may be incomplete, outdated, or contain spelling and grammar mistakes. If you spot an issue or have suggestions, please let us know through Discord.
1. Tribe Limit: Maximum tribe size is 4 players.
2. Respect Others: Be respectful to other players and staff. Respect other players' bases, tames, and property. No griefing, harassment, or intentionally ruining another player's experience.
3. Cheating and Exploits: Any form of cheating, exploiting, or hacking will result in swift and severe consequences. We're here for fair play and a fun experience for everyone.

4. Building & Resources: Building in caves is allowed. Do not block important resource spawns, including metal, crystal, obsidian, oil, and other valuable nodes. Do not build on Beaver Dam spawn locations. Do not block artifact access, boss terminals, obelisks, or major travel routes. Avoid excessive pillar or foundation spam used only to reserve land.
5. Server Maintenance: Inactive bases, structures, and tames may be removed to keep the map clean and available for active players. Keep bases and tame counts reasonable to help server performance.
6. Bugs & Exploits: Please report any bugs, glitches, or issues you discover. No cheats, hacks, exploits, or mesh abuse.
7. Community Events: Have fun. Help other players when you can.
8. Golden Rule: Don't be the reason someone else stops having fun.
Welcome to Strawbee - The Sweetest Place to Survive!
Welcome to the Strawbee Hive! Whether you're a seasoned survivor or just beginning your journey, you'll find a welcoming community, boosted rates, and endless adventures waiting for you.
